verse_text: You are blessed in the holy temple of Your glory, And are highly praised And exceedingly glorious unto the ages.

pericope.title: Hymn of the Three Young Men

links.context: Ode of their fathers: Undoubtedly a psalm or the song of the three young men in the fiery furnace ([[DAN.3:23]]-91). This would have become a regular feature in Jewish liturgical practice. How much more appropriate at such a celebration--and everyone would know the words!
